main.description: A reusable brewing recipe with parameters for repeatable coffee preparation

name.description: User-given name for the recipe (e.g., 'James Hoffmann V60')

brewerRef.description: AT-URI reference to a specific brewer record

brewerType.description: Fallback brewer type when no specific brewer is referenced (e.g., 'Pour-Over', 'French Press')

coffeeAmount.description: Amount of coffee in tenths of grams (e.g., 180 = 18.0g)

waterAmount.description: Amount of water in tenths of grams (e.g., 3000 = 300.0g)

grindSize.description: Grind size setting (can be numeric like '18' or descriptive like 'Medium-Fine')

pours.description: Array of pour information for multi-pour methods

notes.description: Free-text instructions, tips, or notes about the recipe

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the recipe was created

pour.description: Information about a single pour in a multi-pour brewing method

waterAmount.description: Amount of water in this pour (grams or ml)

timeSeconds.description: Time of this pour relative to brew start (seconds)
